description_long: This object is a cartoon-style pizza with a round, golden-brown crust and a creamy yellow base, resembling melted cheese. The pizza features a smiling face, with two large red circles as cheeks and two small black circles as eyes, giving it a playful and friendly appearance. The facial features are outlined with thin, curved lines, adding to the whimsical character. The surface is smooth and slightly matte, with no visible texture or toppings beyond the facial elements. The pizza sits flat on a neutral-colored base, suggesting it is meant to be decorative or playful rather than edible. There are no visible cut lines, packaging, or branding present.
description: A cartoon-style pizza with a golden crust, creamy cheese base, and a smiling face with red cheeks and black eyes. The surface is smooth and playful, with no visible toppings or packaging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full smiling face, with both red cheeks and black eyes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rotated view where the facial features are slightly angled, with the left cheek and eye more prominent.
description_view_2: View from the opposite side, showing the face upside down, with both cheeks and eyes visible but the smile less prominent.
description_view_3: Another rotated view, with the right cheek and eye more prominent, and the smile partially visible.
